name: lsquic-infra
description: Source-only lsquic + ls-qpack for embedding into node-smol-builder as the QUIC engine backing node:smol-quic and node:smol-http3 builtins. No binary release; consumers compile inline via additions/source-patched. Links against node-smol's vendored OpenSSL 3.5.6 (no BoringSSL).
